overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a traditional Japanese mountain shrine during cherry blossom season. The character walks through stone pathways, passes wooden structures, reaches a scenic overlook revealing the valley of Fukuchiyama, and continues through a forest passing under a red torii gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional mountain shrine with cherry blossoms and stone lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up stone steps toward the main shrine building, passing traditional stone lanterns

entered.detail: traditional wooden shrine with curved roof and red pillars, surrounded by cherry blossoms
pink flowering sakura trees framing the shrine approach
traditional Japanese stone lanterns lining the pathway
weathered stone steps leading up to the shrine entrance
moss-covered stone walls supporting the terraced shrine grounds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai character approaching a traditional Japanese mountain shrine during cherry blossom season. The character walks up weathered stone steps lined with stone lanterns, passing moss-covered retaining walls as the main wooden shrine building comes into view ahead, framed by pink sakura trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with ancient cedar trees

events.description: exits the enclosed shrine grounds onto a winding mountain path with ancient trees
emerging from tree cover into brighter light as the path opens toward the overlook

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a stone mountain path, navigating around mossy boulders and ancient trees

entered.detail: tall cedar trees with thick trunks lining the mountain path
distant mountain ranges becoming visible through the trees
large rocks covered in green moss flanking the pathway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shrine behind, the character ascends a winding mountain trail flanked by moss-covered boulders and ancient cedar trees. The enclosed forest path gradually opens up, revealing glimpses of distant mountains ahead as the lighting brightens.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic mountain overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: path opens completely to reveal expansive valley view with layered mountains and morning mist
UI text 'Fukuchiyama' appears identifying the location

agents.ego_description: reaching the overlook and pausing to view the valley, then turning and walking away toward the forest

entered.detail: sweeping view of Fukuchiyama valley with morning mist and layered mountain ridges
hazy blue mountains receding into the distance
game interface text 'Fukuchiyama' appearing at bottom right

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide-open mountain overlook with panoramic views of the Fukuchiyama valley below. Morning mist hangs between the layered mountain ridges as the character pauses to observe the scenery. A UI text overlay identifies the location before the character turns to continue along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with red torii gate

events.description: leaves the open overlook and enters the shaded forest path
character walks through the red torii gate marking the forest entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down a forest trail and passing through a red torii gate into a bamboo grove

entered.detail: traditional red wooden torii gate marking the shrine boundary in the forest
dense bamboo forest visible beyond the torii gate
tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the overlook and descends into a dense forest, where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy. The path leads to a traditional red torii gate, which the character passes through, entering a shaded grove with mossy rocks and bamboo thickets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the structured serenity of a mountain shrine into the expansive wilderness of a forested valley. It begins with a samurai ascending weathered stone steps lined with lanterns and pink sakura trees toward a traditional wooden shrine. As the character leaves the shrine, the scene shifts to a winding mountain trail where enclosed cedar forests gradually open up and the lighting brightens. The path then emerges onto a wide-open overlook revealing a panoramic view of the Fukuchiyama valley draped in morning mist before the camera turns back toward the terrain. Finally, the character descends into a dense forest of dappled sunlight, passing through a red torii gate into a shaded grove of bamboo and mossy rocks.
